summary: Implemented and verified safe reinstall documentation plus a full purge uninstaller for DinoBrain. Added installer-created purge launchers, uninstall verification, ZIP-first release packaging with SHA256 generation, version bump to 0.1.3, and pushed main plus tag v0.1.3. Release asset upload remains blocked in this environment because no GITHUB_TOKEN/GH_TOKEN or gh CLI is available and the browser control surface cannot upload local files.
decisions: Reinstalling over the same folder is supported only when app and data folders are DinoBrain-created Git checkouts; non-git folders are refused instead of overwritten.
Reinstall refreshes repos, rebuilds indexes, and rewrites registrations without deleting dinobrain-data.
Full purge uninstall requires an explicit DELETE DINOBRAIN confirmation unless -Yes is passed, and removes app repo, data repo, portable Node, DinoBrain launchers, and DinoBrain config/hook backups.
The Windows release path now packages DinoBrainSetup.zip plus DinoBrainSetup.zip.sha256 by default because direct EXE download was not acceptable.
Added -SkipUpload so ZIP/SHA packaging can be verified without a GitHub token.
next_steps: To upload the GitHub Release assets, run npm run release:win -- -Tag v0.1.3 -ReplaceAsset after providing GITHUB_TOKEN/GH_TOKEN or installing/authenticating gh with release upload capability.
Review DinoBrain data repo dry-run changes before syncing; git_sync reported 11 changed files requiring review and did not commit or push data.
search_queries: DinoBrain installer reinstall behavior, full purge uninstaller, release version alignment, private data repo policy, install link expectations
